summary: Made two surgical seam fixes: the opening now acknowledges the calendar carry-through from the prior chapter, and the ending now leaves Owen heading toward the kitchens with the ash-linen notebook on him, matching the next chapter's boundary start without changing the chapter's core decision.
edits: Adjusted the first sentence to make the jump from the prior chapter's night planning into April feel intentional.
Changed Owen's dormitory prep so the ash-linen notebook stays on his body instead of under the bed.
Reframed the final beat to hand off at Owen's turn toward the kitchens before curfew rather than after he has already slipped into the lower passage.
